title: Brain Adapter Meta
description: Model information and contributor details for a brain adapter

max_messages.description: Sliding window size — max conversation messages to include in context

include_summary.description: Whether to prepend a summary of earlier conversation when window is exceeded

tuning.description: LoRA fine-tuning parameters for this size class

min_training_examples.description: Minimum I/O pairs before LoRA training kicks in

test_cases_per_batch.description: Number of test cases the critic generates per evaluation round

few_shot_limit.description: Max few-shot examples included in the prompt

lora_target_modules.description: Attention layer modules to target for LoRA

training_max_length.description: Tokenizer max sequence length for training

warmup_steps.description: LR warmup steps at start of training

eval_split.description: Fraction of training data held out for validation

quantization.description: Base model quantization for training (QLoRA when 4bit/8bit)

gradient_accumulation_steps.description: Gradient accumulation steps (effective batch = batch_size * this)

qualification.description: Pass/fail thresholds and iteration limits for adapter qualification

minimum_threshold.description: Minimum score to pass qualification — adapter is usable above this

golden_threshold.description: Golden standard score — adapter is fully production-ready above this

min_iterations.description: Minimum qualification attempts before accepting minimum_threshold

golden_iterations.description: Maximum qualification attempts to reach golden_threshold
